_v2.2.0_changes: 1) Threshold 62->55/57 — 1h MTF filter is new quality gate. 2) EURUSD/EURGBP permanently blocked. 3) GBPAUD+GBPCAD added — GBP crosses, BIS top-25, BoE-driven. 4) B_min_score 62->55. 5) max_open_positions 3->5. 6) Session bonuses for new GBP crosses.
_sentiment_note: FinBERT gates USD-restricted pairs only (binary pass/block). GBP pairs and GBP crosses (GBPAUD/GBPCAD) are pure technical — zero sentiment noise.

aggressive._note: v2.2.0: 62->55. 1h MTF filter is now the quality gate. Score 55-61 only passes with 1h EMA agreement.

conservative._note: v2.2.0: 62->57. Slightly higher than aggressive to keep conservative mode stricter.

tiers._note: v2.2.0: B_min_score 62->55 to match new thresholds. Tier C (below 55) permanently blocked. A/A+ unchanged.

session_thresholds._note: v2.2.0: 50->48 to match new threshold of 55. ASIAN/OVERLAP still blocked. LATE_US at 60 — thin volume.

pair_limits._note: EURUSD=0 (7t, 0% WR, -177p, blocked). EURGBP=0 (0% WR). GBPAUD/GBPCAD=3 (new). GBPUSD=5 BUY-only. GBPJPY=1 (cap risk).

GBPUSD.reason: GBPUSD SELL: 0/3 wins (-49.7p). BUY: 50%+ WR live. BoE hawkishness = structural GBP bid 2025-26.

directional_filters._note: Block specific directions for pairs with confirmed directional bias.

session_expiry_minutes._note: EUROPEAN/US 4h — data-validated. GBPAUD/GBPCAD inherit these as GBP crosses.

usd_pair_rules._note: v2.2.0: EURUSD removed (now in _PERMANENTLY_BLOCKED_PAIRS and pair_limits=0). GBPAUD/GBPCAD are NOT USD pairs — unrestricted. Remaining USD pairs US-session-only with FinBERT gate.
usd_pair_rules._gate_note: Net sentiment > 0.1 required. v2.2.1: raised from 0.0 — neutral was passing bad trades.

sentiment._setup: Requires GitHub secrets: HF_API_KEY, NEWSAPI_KEY, MARKETAUX_API_KEY.

risk_management._note: v2.2.0: 3->5 — 12 pairs monitored, need capacity for concurrent signals.

economic_calendar._note: Forex Factory blackout. GBPAUD: also covers RBA events (AUD). GBPCAD: also covers BoC events (CAD). Standard calendar logic handles this automatically.

live_price_validation._note: X-Rates via Browserless. GBPAUD/GBPCAD validated same as other pairs.

_research_notes.GBPAUD: BIS 2025: AUD ranks 5th globally by FX volume. GBPAUD avg daily range 80-120 pips. BoE vs RBA divergence creates sustained directional momentum. No USD dependency — immune to Fed macro events. EUROPEAN session strongest.
_research_notes.GBPCAD: BIS 2025: CAD ranks 6th globally. GBPCAD = BoE rates vs oil/BoC — two clear fundamental drivers. US session optimal — NY crude oil peaks. 80-100 pip daily range.
_research_notes.EURUSD_block: 7t, 0% WR, -177p. FinBERT gate applied, still 0% WR. USD-session restriction applied, still 0% WR. ECB-Fed policy gap compressing — reduced trend clarity. Permanently blocked.
_research_notes.1h_filter: Murphy (2002) MTF analysis: confirmation across timeframes raises directional accuracy ~15-20%. EMA12>EMA26>EMA50 on 1h = trend confirmed across 3 MAs. EMA50 chosen over EMA200 on 1h for intraday responsiveness.
